Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2023-10-21, 2023-11-24. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia tag from wikipedia tag in an outdated form
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect

  • wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(2950551730)['wikidata'='Q15107223']['wikipedia'='de:Bahnhof Mannheim-Rheinau']; node(441241274)['wikidata'='Q51349018']['wikipedia'='de:Steinbach (Mudau)']; node(9695154263)['wikidata'='Q111333763']['wikipedia'='de:Flink SE']; relation(3146811)['wikidata'='Q1008367']['wikipedia'='de:Bundestagswahlkreis Ludwigsburg']; relation(3146880)['wikidata'='Q1008754']['wikipedia'='de:Bundestagswahlkreis Zollernalb – Sigmaringen']; relation(3146880)['wikidata'='Q1008754']['wikipedia'='de:Bundestagswahlkreis Zollernalb – Sigmaringen']; way(110995738)['wikidata'='Q100852269']['wikipedia'='de:Flugplatz Bartholomä-Amalienhof']; way(232272815)['wikidata'='Q1699345']['wikipedia'='de:Schloss Neusteußlingen']; way(318836199)['wikidata'='Q47716847']['wikipedia'='de:Laurentiuskapelle (Hof Esselbrunn)']; way(426352487)['wikidata'='Q50038581']['wikipedia'='de:Epilepsiezentrum_Kork']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags
species:wikidata and species:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because species:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

an affected OSM element that may be improved
